calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Pltf'S Request For Court Judgment
Off Calendar May-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Morgan K. Lopez, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, E.I. Dupont de Nemours and Company.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Autobahn Collision Repair Specialist.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Anthony Trevos sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $45,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 5.75%: $2,976.30
Attorney's Fees: $6524.50
Costs: $781.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $54,578.80
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Continued To Jun-05-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
